svg.title: Open-source voice agent on Azure infrastructure
svg.desc: Architecture showing open-source alternatives for each layer — speech, orchestration, LLM, and storage — all deployed on Azure Kubernetes Service in Qatar Central.

g.text: Azure Qatar Central — AKS cluster (infrastructure only)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I handle PSTN calls in an open-source voice agent on Azure?')
sendPrompt('How do I handle WebRTC in an open-source voice agent?')
sendPrompt('How can I connect an open-source voice agent to a bot channel?')
sendPrompt('What open-source API gateway works well for a voice agent?')
sendPrompt('How does Whisper work for Arabic, French and English STT?')
sendPrompt('What open-source language detection library works with Arabic?')
sendPrompt('What open-source TTS supports Arabic, French and English neural voices?')
sendPrompt('How do I use LangChain or LlamaIndex to orchestrate a voice agent?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a RAG pipeline with open-source tools for multilingual conversations?')

svg.text: LLM layer (self-hosted on AKS GPU nodes)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I deploy Llama 3 or Mistral on Azure Kubernetes Service GPU nodes?')
sendPrompt('How do I serve open-source LLMs with vLLM or Ollama on Azure?')
sendPrompt('What are the best Arabic-capable open-source LLMs?')
sendPrompt('How do I deploy Qdrant or Milvus on Azure Kubernetes Service as a vector database?')
sendPrompt('How do I use MongoDB or PostgreSQL on Azure for conversation history storage?')
sendPrompt('How do I store audio and transcripts using MinIO on Azure?')

svg.text: Azure infra services (not AI — always available in Qatar Central)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up AKS with GPU nodes for LLM inference in Qatar Central?')
sendPrompt('How do I use Azure Container Registry with open-source model images?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Azure VNet and private endpoints for a secure voice agent?')
sendPrompt('How do I monitor open-source services on AKS using Prometheus and Grafana?')
sendPrompt('Give me a step-by-step guide to build a POC open-source multilingual voice agent on Azure AKS')
sendPrompt('What does a production open-source voice agent on AKS look like at scale?')

svg.text: All compute on AKS in Qatar Central · Zero data leaves the region · No proprietary AI API calls
Click any component to explore further
